title: anisomeris microloba
intro: Anisomeris microloba, also known as the Mexican clover, is a type of flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Anisomeris microloba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including infections and digestive issues.
